heading: Witness fees and allowances
label: 503 Witness fees and allowances
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 95R.S. § 185. .5 U.S.C. 95a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 744, § 1060 Stat. 809Former sections 95 and 95a are combined and restated for clarity and brevity. The words “or expenses in the case of Government officers and employees” are omitted as covered by . The word “agency” is substituted for “department” and defined to conform to the definition of “department” in , .section 1823 of title 28section 18 of the Act of Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 74460 Stat. 811This section was part of title IV of the Revised Statutes. The , as added , (former ), which provides “Except to the extent inconsistent with the provisions of this Act [National Security Act of 1947], the provisions of title IV of the Revised Statutes as now or hereafter amended shall be applicable to the Department of Defense” is omitted from this title but is not repealed.Act of July 26, 1947, ch. 343, § 201(d)Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 412, § 463 Stat. 5795 U.S.C. 171–1Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.text: For the purpose of this section, “agency” has the meaning given it by .section 5721 of this title
